name: English Derby Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolks and mix well to combine.
3. Blend in the sour cream, vanilla extract, and lemon juice.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with salt until stiff peaks form (do not overbeat).
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the crumb-lined springform pan.
7. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour in an oven that has been preheated with the door closed.
8. Keep the cake in the oven for an additional 30 minutes with the door slightly open.
9. Remove from the oven and chill overnight.
A light, fluffy cheesecake
